name: Candied Holiday Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Position rack in the lowest third of the oven and preheat to 250°F.
2. Grease and flour a 12-cup bundt pan or tube cake pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix pecans and fruits with 3 tablespoons flour.
4. In another large bowl, cream butter with sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Beat in eggs one at a time. Stir in vanilla and lemon extracts.
6. Sift 3 3/4 cups flour with baking powder and salt. Add dry ingredients to batter; stir until blended.
7. Mix fruit mixture into batter.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan.
9. Bake until golden brown and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, about 2 1/2 hours.
10. Cool in pan on a rack for 15 minutes. Turn out onto a rack and cool.
(Can be prepared up to 2 weeks ahead. Wrap in foil and store at room temperature.)
11. Dust with powdered sugar.
